rag_rules: Place component type contracts in valid component type scopes, using visible feature names and concrete bounds.
Use visible identifiers to define range assumptions and guarantees in AGREE annex blocks.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE expressions match the expected types (bool, int, real) for valid syntax.
Formulate guarantees as boolean expressions that relate visible variables to bounds or conditions.
Structure AGREE annex blocks with clear variable declarations and guarantee statements.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Declare range checks as boolean variables before using them in guarantees.
Use valid AADL component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees involving ports.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Do not reference subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts.
